summary: Tested variant pages blank squares and $0 market data issue. Backend API via /api/vinyl/release/{discogs_id} works correctly - returns cover_url, community stats (28,164 owners), and market value ($33.61 median) for Speak Now Orchid. Frontend /variant/{releaseId} page renders correctly. ISSUE: Slug-based route /vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} has slug resolution bug - 'speak-now-taylors-version' doesn't match 'Speak Now (Taylor's Version)' in DB due to apostrophe/parentheses stripping.

minor.issue: Slug resolution fails for titles with special characters. 'speak-now-taylors-version' cannot match 'Speak Now (Taylor's Version)' because unslugify() doesn't restore parentheses/apostrophes stripped during slugify(). Function _resolve_discogs_id() needs fuzzy matching.

integration_issues.issue: Search results link to /vinyl/{slug} pages which fail to resolve due to slug matching bug. The /variant/{releaseId} route works correctly but search cards may not link to it.

issues: One blank placeholder visible for 'Speak Now (Taylor's Version) / Frankenstein Set / Limited' variant - cover_url missing

frontend_variant_release_page.details: /variant/27597354 displays album art, Market Value $33.61 median/$49.13 high, 28,164 owners, 3,037 wantlist, 19 internal collectors

frontend_vinyl_slug_page.details: /vinyl/taylor-swift/speak-now-taylors-version/orchid-marbled returns blank data: cover_url=null, discogs_id=null, all stats=0, 'No recorded sales yet'

action_items: FIX BACKEND: Improve _resolve_discogs_id() in vinyl.py to handle slugified titles with special characters (parentheses, apostrophes). Consider: 1) Fuzzy text matching, 2) Also search discogs_releases collection, 3) Store slugified versions in DB for direct lookup
VERIFY: Ensure search results variant cards link to /variant/{discogs_id} route instead of /vinyl/{slug} route to avoid slug resolution failures
critical_code_review_comments: Slug resolution in vinyl.py has fundamental limitation: slugify() strips characters that can't be recovered by unslugify(). Albums with parentheses like 'Speak Now (Taylor's Version)' become 'speak-now-taylors-version' which cannot match back.
Consider adding a 'slug' field to discogs_releases collection during caching, or use fuzzy regex matching in _resolve_discogs_id()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/vinyl/release/{discogs_id} endpoint fully working with fallback chains for market data and community stats. Frontend /variant/{releaseId} route works. Issue is with slug-based /vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} route - the slug resolution function cannot match titles containing parentheses/apostrophes. Search results show album art correctly. One blank cover observed for 'Frankenstein Set' variant.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: slugify() removes parentheses and apostrophes (line 88: re.sub(r"[^\w\s-]", "", text)), but unslugify() only replaces hyphens with spaces. When searching DB, regex escape of 'speak now taylors version' cannot match 'Speak Now (Taylor's Version)'. Fix: Implement fuzzy matching or store pre-slugified titles in DB.
